name: ghost-persona
description: AI coding agent memory and context system

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/file-watcher && npm run build --workspace=packages/context-processor && npm run build --workspace=packages/markdown-generator && npm run build --workspace=packages/encryption && npm run build --workspace=packages/sync-manager && npm run build --workspace=packages/memory-engine && npm run build --workspace=packages/tech-stack-detector && npm run build --workspace=packages/git-history && npm run build --workspace=packages/vector-search && npm run build --workspace=packages/semantic-search && npm run build --workspace=packages/natural-language-queries && npm run build --workspace=packages/cloud-sync
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/cli && npm run build --workspace=apps/extension
scripts.build:all: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
